headline: Devon Commences Private Exchange Offers and Coterra Commences Consent Solicitations
summary: HOUSTON, May 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE: DVN) (“Devon”) and Coterra Energy Inc. (formerly NYSE: CTRA) (“Coterra”) today announced that, in connection with the completed merger of Coterra, with Coterra surviving as a direct, wholly owned subsidiary of Devon, Devon has commenced offers to Eligible Holders (as defined herein) to exchange (each, an “Exchange Offer” and collectively, the “Exchange Offers”) any and all outstanding notes issued by Coterra as set forth i

headline: Devon Energy’s Delaware Basin Bet Expands Inventory And Capital Options
summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) acquired 16,300 net undeveloped acres in the core Delaware Basin for about $2.6b in a recent U.S. government oil and gas lease auction. The company was the largest buyer in the record-setting auction, accounting for roughly $2.5b of the $4b total federal sale. The deal adds around 400 drilling locations with favorable economics and lease terms, expanding Devon's future drilling inventory. For investors tracking NYSE:DVN, this federal lease move adds a fresh piece of...

headline: Devon Spends $2.6 Billion to Expand Delaware Basin Footprint
summary: Devon Energy has acquired 16,300 net undeveloped acres in the core of the Delaware Basin for $2.6 billion through a federal lease sale, strengthening its long-term inventory following its merger with Coterra.
